title: Access Wildfire Resilience Index Data
text: package provides utilities querying local STAC catalog retrieving asset information, designed wildfire resilience data workflows.

title: Access Wildfire Resilience Index Data
text: Hard-coded local STAC catalog path Functions list, filter, extract properties STAC items Asset URL extraction COG file types Ready extension remote STAC APIs COG tile retrieval

title: Access Wildfire Resilience Index Data
text: Use devtools::document() generate documentation Use devtools::check() run package checks Use testthat unit testing Use usethis::use_r() add new R scripts Use pkgdown build package website

title: Access Wildfire Resilience Index Data
text: See r-pkgs.org best practices.
code: library(firex)  # Browse the catalog — see all domains, dimensions, and available layers wri_overview()  # Get the full catalog as a data frame (one row per asset) df <- wri_overview_df()  # Look up metadata for a specific layer layer_info("WRI_score")  # Retrieve a raster layer (full extent) rast <- get_layer("WRI_score")  # Retrieve a raster layer cropped to a bounding box (xmin, ymin, xmax, ymax) bbox <- c(-122, 37, -121, 38) rast <- get_layer("WRI_score", bbox = bbox)  # Query STAC items by property catalog <- wri_overview() items <- lapply(catalog$data$items, function(x) x$item) water_status <- query_stac_flexible(items, wri_domain = "water", data_type = "status")

title: NA
text: devtools::document() -> missing exported functions Old docs/tests still referenced removed API. Regenerated docs, cleaned references. get_layer.R -> “@examples requires value” Empty roxygen examples block. Added small \dontrun{} example. query_stac_flexible() example -> load_stac_items() missing Old example older code. Replaced inline STAC-like example. Tests -> list_domains(), list_layers(), search_layers() missing Stale tests deprecated functions. Removed/replaced current API tests. get_layer() test -> expected old message "Layer 'id' required" Validation message changed. Updated tests current wording. wri_overview() -> “STAC catalog found” Path helper still pointed wri-data-processing/stac. Switched inst/extdata/stac dev extdata/stac installed. wri_overview() -> “items discovered collection ‘wri_ignitR’” Collection STAC date. Updated collection.json include rel = "item" links. wri_items_df() -> extent columns wrong/missing xmin/ymin/xmax/ymax actually read item bbox. Fixed extraction item_obj$bbox. get_layer() + bbox helpers -> fully connected Normalized bbox always reused. Added is_valid_bbox() output reuse + check_extent_overlap() call. check_extent_overlap() -> incomplete Finished bbox-vs-layer-bbox helper. Structured TRUE/FALSE + status/message. bbox validation messages -> unclear Added labeled user input: xmin, ymin, xmax, ymax. bbox length/type error -> explicit enough Changed “must contain four numeric values: c(xmin, ymin, xmax, ymax)”. bbox wording -> mixed xmin/xmax lon/lat Standardized xmin, ymin, xmax, ymax.

title: NA
text: Public-facing get_layer() -> kept, expanded Added crs; wired is_valid_bbox() + check_extent_overlap(); cleaned examples/validation flow. is_valid_bbox() -> kept, expanded Absorbed validate_bbox() role; can normalize EPSG:4326; returns logical + attrs. validate_bbox() -> removed Logic merged is_valid_bbox(). check_extent_overlap() -> kept, simplified Now bbox vs layer_bbox; STAC lookup inside. layer_info() -> kept Main benefit STAC path + item discovery fixes. query_stac_flexible() -> kept Main change: example cleanup. wri_overview() -> kept Working STAC path/item-link fixes. wri_overview_df() -> kept Working repaired STAC pipeline. print.wri_overview() -> kept major rewrite; benefits repaired overview object. Internal wri_utils.R %||% -> kept major change. .wri_require_rstac() -> kept major change. .wri_prop1() -> kept major change. wri_get_pkg_path() -> kept Still dev-mode package-root resolver. wri_resolve_stac_path() -> changed Old path removed; now uses package inst/extdata/stac / installed extdata/stac. wri_resolve_href() -> kept major change. wri_links_by_rel() -> kept major change. wri_item_assets_df() -> kept major change. wri_read_stac_root() -> kept major change. wri_read_stac_tree() -> kept Started working STAC path + collection links fixed. wri_items_df() -> changed Correct bbox extent extraction item STAC. .wri_pick_raster_asset() -> changed Hosted raster asset filtering cleaned . .make_result() -> added Shared helper logical return + message/status/bbox attrs. Removed / stale names cleaned list_domains() -> deleted / present Removed stale tests/docs. list_layers() -> deleted / present Removed stale tests/docs. list_dimensions() -> deleted / present Removed stale docs. list_data_types() -> deleted / present Removed stale docs. search_layers() -> deleted / present Removed stale tests/docs. catalog_summary() -> deleted / present Removed stale docs. load_stac_items() -> deleted / present Removed stale example dependency.

what: Check whether a bounding box falls within a layer extent — check_extent_overlap
title: Check whether a bounding box falls within a layer extent — check_extent_overlap
text: Checks whether requested bounding box fully contained within extent layer bounding box.

title: Check whether a bounding box falls within a layer extent — check_extent_overlap
Check whether a bounding box falls within a layer extent — check_extent_overlap
text: bbox Numeric vector form c(xmin, ymin, xmax, ymax) EPSG:4326. layer_bbox Numeric vector form c(xmin, ymin, xmax, ymax) describing layer extent EPSG:4326.

title: Check whether a bounding box falls within a layer extent — check_extent_overlap
text: length-1 logical. Returns TRUE bbox fully contained within requested layer extent FALSE otherwise. return value carries "status", "message", "bbox" attributes can inspected later.

title: Check whether a bounding box falls within a layer extent — check_extent_overlap
text: Overlap outcomes: Full overlap - returns TRUE Partial overlap - returns FALSE message describing side layer extent bbox exceeds overlap - returns FALSE message bbox overlap layer extent

what: Get a WRI raster layer — get_layer
title: Get a WRI raster layer — get_layer
text: Get WRI raster layer

title: Get a WRI raster layer — get_layer
Get a WRI raster layer — get_layer
text: id Character. Layer id retrieve. bbox Numeric vector c(xmin, ymin, xmax, ymax) supplied crs. NULL, returns full layer. crs Character. Coordinate reference system bbox. Defaults "EPSG:4326".

title: Get a WRI raster layer — get_layer
text: terra::SpatRaster.

title: Get a WRI raster layer — get_layer
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ bbox <- c(-122, 37, -121, 38) rast <- get_layer("WRI_score", bbox = bbox) } # }

what: Check if a bounding box is valid — is_valid_bbox
title: Check if a bounding box is valid — is_valid_bbox
text: Check bounding box valid

title: Check if a bounding box is valid — is_valid_bbox
Check if a bounding box is valid — is_valid_bbox
text: bbox numeric vector. Expected format: c(xmin, ymin, xmax, ymax) supplied crs. crs character. Coordinate reference system bounding box. Default "EPSG:4326".

title: Check if a bounding box is valid — is_valid_bbox
text: length-1 logical "status", "message", "bbox" attributes. success, "bbox" attribute contains validated bounding box EPSG:4326.

title: Check if a bounding box is valid — is_valid_bbox
code: is_valid_bbox(c(-120, 34, -119, 35))  # TRUE #> [1] TRUE #> attr(,"status") #> [1] "valid" #> attr(,"bbox") #> [1] -120   34 -119   35 is_valid_bbox(c(-119, 34, -120, 35))  # FALSE #> [1] FALSE #> attr(,"message") #> [1] "You supplied bbox = c(xmin = -119, ymin = 34, xmax = -120, ymax = 35). `xmin` must be less than `xmax`." #> attr(,"status") #> [1] "invalid" #> attr(,"bbox") #> [1] -119   34 -120   35

what: Get metadata for one WRI layer — layer_info
title: Get metadata for one WRI layer — layer_info
text: Returns metadata single layer WRI STAC catalog.

title: Get metadata for one WRI layer — layer_info
Get metadata for one WRI layer — layer_info
text: layer_id Character. layer/item id look , e.g. "WRI_score". fresh Logical. TRUE (default), rebuilds catalog disk. FALSE, implemented yet.

title: Get metadata for one WRI layer — layer_info
text: one-row data frame containing metadata requested layer.

title: Normalize a CRS specification — normalize_crs
text: Accepts CRS several common formats returns terra-recognized form.

title: Normalize a CRS specification — normalize_crs
Normalize a CRS specification — normalize_crs
text: crs One : integer EPSG code (e.g. 4326); character string (e.g. "EPSG:4326", "4326", PROJ string, WKT string); SpatVector, SpatRaster, SpatExtent whose CRS pulled. Pass NULL return NULL.

title: Normalize a CRS specification — normalize_crs
text: length-1 logical "status", "message", "crs" attributes. success, "crs" contains normalized CRS string.
